title: Automation to send a board view (charts) weekly/monthly to our Company President
excerpt: I would like to send a weekly snapshot at the end of the week of the charts we keep for a certain board so that our Company President can view the snapshot.

posts.author: Claire.Koopman (claire.koopman@bekins.us)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to send a weekly snapshot at the end of the week of the charts we keep for a certain board so that our Company President can view the snapshot.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Claire.Koopman

We developed an app called Board Report Automations that allows generating advanced reports. These reports are built based on monday.com docs so you can export them PDF, collaborate, comment and more. They’re also sent via notification & email.

In this case you can build a weekly summary report and send it, here’s as an example →

Screenshot 2024-03-05 at 15.25.122134×532 29.4 KB

There’s a bunch of other reports for other user cases of course.
You can find it in the monday.com marketplace within the platform or here - monday.com: Apps Marketplace

Hope that helps!
